description_long: This object represents a stylized police officer figure, depicted in a dynamic, action-oriented pose with arms raised and legs bent as if in motion. The figure is dressed in a dark blue uniform, which appears to include a long-sleeved shirt and matching pants, with the overall silhouette suggesting a modern patrol attire. The uniform is form-fitting and lacks visible accessories such as a utility belt or equipment, and there are no clearly defined facial features or hands. The head is covered by a matching dark blue cap or helmet, blending seamlessly with the rest of the uniform. The figure's proportions are exaggerated, with elongated limbs and a narrow torso, giving it a somewhat abstract or minimalist appearance. No visible police insignia, badges, or equipment are present on the uniform.
description: A stylized police officer in a dark blue, form-fitting uniform with a matching cap, posed dynamically with raised arms and bent legs. The figure is minimalist, lacking visible equipment or insignia.
description_view_0: Front view showing the police officer's chest, bent legs, and raised arms, with the head and cap visible at the top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated arm and leg, with the cap and upper body profile visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the uniform, both arms extended outward, and the back of the cap.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other arm and leg, with the side profile of the cap and torso.
attribute_uniform_type: Modern patrol uniform with long-sleeved, dark blue shirt and pants, form-fitting with no visible accessories or tactical gear.
attribute_headgear_style: Dark blue cap or helmet, rounded and seamless with the uniform, no visible insignia or brim.
